data.description: Datacentrex Reports Full Year 2025 Results; Achieves Positive Adjusted EBITDA in Transformational Year

data.title: BioAge Labs to Present at 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference
data.description: BioAge Labs, Inc., a biotechnology company listed under NASDAQ as BIOA, will be participating in the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference from April 13 to 16, 2026. The company, headquartered in Emeryville, California, focuses on developing therapeutic products for metabolic diseases by addressing human aging biology. This news was disclosed by BioAge Labs, Inc. during their announcement.

data.title: Rezolve Ai to Host Investor Call: The $700M+ Case for Combining with Commerce.com
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Rezolve Ai PLC disclosed it will conduct an investor call and Q&A session for shareholders of Rezolve Ai and Commerce.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: CMRC) on April 15, 2026, at 8:00 AM Eastern Time. The call, to be led by Daniel M. Wagner, Chairman and CEO of Rezolve Ai, will address various topics regarding AI-native commerce infrastructure.

data.title: Cema-Cel Pivotal Trial Interim Data Highlight Strength of Cellectis’ Allogeneic CAR-T Platform
data.description: New York, 13th April 2026—Cellectis, a biotechnology company trading under Euronext Growth: ALCLS and NASDAQ: CLLS, is utilizing its innovative gene editing platform to create life-saving cell and gene therapies. Today, Cellectis discussed the interim futility analysis revealed by Allogene Therapeutics, Inc. from the pivotal ALPHA3 trial sponsored by Allogene. This trial is assessing cema-cel in first-line consolidation for large B-cell lymphoma (LBCL). Cema-cel is a candidate product that Servier holds a license for under the License, Development and Commercialization Agreement between Servier, Cellectis, and Institut de Recherches Internationales Servier. Servier has sublicensed cema-cel to Allogene in specific regions.

data.title: PENSKE AUTOMOTIVE GROUP SCHEDULES FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS CONFERENCE CALL
data.description: Penske Automotive Group, Inc., a diversified international transportation services company and a leading automotive and commercial truck retailer, recently disclosed their intention to publish financial results for the quarter ending on a certain date. The company, based in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, operates on a global scale and is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol PAG. This news was announced on April 13, 2026, via PRNewswire.

data.title: Boqii to Hold Annual General Meeting on May 6, 2026
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Boqii Holding Limited, a prominent pet-focused platform in China traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BQ, revealed plans for their upcoming 2026 annual general meeting of shareholders. The meeting is scheduled to take place on or near Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 8:00 p.m.

data.title: Hydro One to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on May 13, 2026 Before Markets Open
data.description: A teleconference for the investment community is scheduled to take place on May 13, 2026, at 8 a.m. EDT. Hydro One Limited (TSX: H), the primary electric transmission and distribution utility in Ontario, is set to disclose its first-quarter financial results that same morning. The teleconference presents an opportunity for investors to learn about the performance of Hydro One Limited, which stands as the biggest electric utility company in Ontario.

data.title: Orion Properties Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Webcast Dates
data.description: Orion Properties Inc. (NYSE: ONL), a real estate investment trust owning single-tenant net lease office properties including Dedicated Use Assets nationwide, will report Q1 2026 results after market close on May 7, 2026. The company will hold a webcast and conference call for investors and analysts to discuss the financial outcomes. This disclosure is a part of Orion's commitment to maintaining transparency and providing stakeholders with timely updates on its performance and operations.

data.title: SEC releases new DeFi policy, welcomed by crypto leaders. Policy boosts DeFi interfaces.
data.description: On Monday, the SEC announced a lenient policy regarding DeFi interfaces, which was met with enthusiasm by prominent figures in the crypto industry.

data.title: WaterBridge Schedules First Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: WaterBridge Infrastructure LLC (NYSE: WBI; NYSE TX: WBI) based in Houston, disclosed that its financial results for Q1 2026 will be made public post-market closing on May 6, 2026. The company has scheduled a webcast and conference call on May 7, 2026, at 11 a.m. Central Time / 12 p.m. Eastern Time to address these results. For those interested in the live webcast, they can access it through the Events and Presentations section of the WaterBridge website.

data.title: Net Power Names Lee Shuman as New Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Net Power Inc. (NYSE: NPWR) has appointed Lee Shuman as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) starting April 13, 2026. CEO Danny Rice expressed his enthusiasm for Shuman joining the team, emphasizing the company's focus on becoming a key player in clean gas power plants. Shuman's expertise in securing strategic financing for new power generation aligns with Net Power's goals.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Repurchase of own shares on 13.04.2026
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp announced changes in its own shares, with the transaction completed at 22:30 EET. The bank, identified by LEI 529900ODI3047E2LIV03, repurchased shares with ISIN FI4000297767 on this date. The specific details of the repurchase, including the trading venue, were not provided in the announcement. This move represents an important development in the company's financial activities.

data.title: MiniMax releases advanced AI model MiniMax M2.7, competing with Claude Opus. Commercial terms updated post-release.
data.description: MiniMax M2.7 has emerged as a strong competitor to Claude Opus on fundamental coding evaluations, showcasing exceptional performance. However, following the release of the weights on Hugging Face, a Chinese AI lab promptly modified their commercial terms.

data.title: Bitmine increases Ether purchases, reaches 4% ownership of total supply, plans to hit 5% with staking strategy.
data.description: Bitmine has recently acquired a significant amount of Ether, increasing its ownership to approximately 4% of the total supply. This move comes as the company expands its staking strategy, distinguishing it from others who are hesitant to boost their Ether holdings.

data.title: Top-Producing Team Jackson Arnett Group Joins Douglas Elliman in Rancho Santa Fe and North County Coastal San Diego
data.description: On April 13, 2026, in San Diego, it was reported that Douglas Elliman Realty, a leading luxury real estate brokerage in the US, revealed that the Jackson Arnett Group, a prominent real estate team in San Diego, California, and a former top-ranking team on RealTrends as the #3 Medium Size Team.

data.title: Par Pacific Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Schedule
data.description: Houston based company Par Pacific Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PARR) will unveil its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 5, 2026, after the New York Stock Exchange trading hours. Investors can join a conference call on May 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. CT (10:00 a.m. ET). The detailed report will be accessible on Par Pacific’s website.

data.title: Lamar Advertising Company to Release First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026 Operating Results
data.description: Baton Rouge-based Lamar Advertising Company (Nasdaq: LAMR) is set to announce its earnings report for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026, on Thursday, May 7, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call is scheduled to take place on the same day at 8:00 a.m. (Central Time) for discussions regarding the company’s performance and to address any queries related to its operations. This event will give investors and stakeholders insights into Lamar's financial standing and strategic outlook moving forward.

data.title: AGF Investments Welcomes John Porter as Chief Investment Officer
data.description: In Toronto on April 13, 2026, AGF Investments Inc. disclosed the selection of John Porter as the Chief Investment Officer (CIO), commencing his role on May 1, 2026. With the trading symbol TSX:AGF.B, AGF Investments made this announcement. Mr. Porter, appointed to the position, has an abundance of experience in investment management and leadership spanning numerous years across global markets and asset types. His proficiencies include a profound understanding of portfolio management and a rich background in retail and institutional asset management.

data.title: Copa Holdings Announces Monthly Traffic Statistics for March 2026
data.description: In Panama City on April 13, 2026, Copa Holdings, S.A. (NYSE: CPA) disclosed its preliminary passenger traffic figures for March 2026.
